title: iris kaempferi var. hortensis
intro: Iris kaempferi var. hortensis, also known as the Japanese iris, is a flowering plant species belonging to the iris family (Iridaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its high content of iridin and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Iris kaempferi var. hortensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve the use of its rhizomes and roots, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
